content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names how the client is showing up, not just what they're saying, and the reads precede and ground the questions. In turn 4, the coach catches the laugh and reflects the specific linguistic tell ('make decisions without running the math first'). In turn 6, the coach explicitly names a defensive shift: 'I also noticed you used it as the moment to pull back a little, when we were getting somewhere real' — a textbook AoA read of the moment the client armored. In turn 8, the coach concedes the pushback accurately ('You're right. I was pushing too hard') showing live tracking of the client's stance. The coach also reads the pattern beneath the content (the dad's unfinished work, the architecture of the book) rather than engaging the financial content at face value — exactly the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body read the scenario calls for. Reads are specific (the careful tone, the pull-back, the laugh, the coffee-maker detail) and timely, landing at moments that change the conversation's direction.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with content-level questions; no read named yet, though 'worth slowing down' gestures at pacing."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the laugh ('That laugh matters') and the specific linguistic tell about 'running the math first.' Read precedes the question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Strong AoA read: explicitly names the defensive pull-back ('you used it as the moment to pull back a little'). Distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the client's stance accurately, acknowledges the push was too hard — meta-level read of the relational field."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads what the client just did ('said something out loud you've probably been carrying'); names the language-of-money-as-his-language pattern."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client turn; coach not present."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "childhood-imprinting", "money-as-surrogate"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["same-scarcity-story-regardless-of-wealth"],
  "notes": "Reads are specific (laugh, pull-back, linguistic caveats) rather than generic, and consistently precede the inquiry — meeting the bar for a 3."
}
